app.name: PostHog Context
app.short_description: Surfaces PostHog user context inside the ticket sidebar
app.long_description: Auto-enriches Zendesk tickets with the requester's PostHog data: plan & MRR, recent event timeline, friction signals, session recordings, and active feature flags — so agents stop spending the first 5 minutes asking what PostHog already knows.
app.installation_instructions: Set bridge_url to the URL of your running enricher service (the FastAPI app in /enricher).

bridge_url.label: Bridge URL
bridge_url.helpText: URL of the enricher API, e.g. http://localhost:8123
